data.content: Third follow-up fix for the queue overview: expanded the selected-row detail strip to a 3-column layout with Description, Notes, and Handoff Capsules, and parsed capsule metadata from knotsHandoffCapsules so the right column shows agent/user/time context with latest capsules first. Verified with bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build.
